testing_centers.notes: PSI testing centers nationwide; online remote proctoring also available

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match NHA registration exactly. Secondary ID may be requested at test center.
exam_rules: Closed-book computer-based test. On-screen calculator provided where applicable. No personal items permitted in testing room. Score scale 200–500; passing score is 390.
renewal_options: 2-year certification validity. Renewal requires 10 CE credits per 2-year cycle. CE can be completed through NHA online platform or approved providers. Renewal application submitted through NHA candidate portal.

prerequisites.description: Completion of an NHA-recognized billing and coding program or 1 year of recent work experience in medical billing/coding

retake_policy.notes: Candidates must wait 30 days before retaking an NHA exam. Full exam fee required for each retake attempt.

official_study_resources.title: NHA Exam Content Outline
official_study_resources.notes: Free content outlines per certification available on NHA website

official_study_resources.title: NHA Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Official NHA study materials and practice tests available for purchase

aliases: certified billing and coding specialist cbcs
